llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9.1 (School Board Self-Evaluation – Discussion of Results) was moved to after item 12.3 (Information section). This change was announced during the 'Changes to the Agenda' section at the beginning of the meeting.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I move we approve the consent age agenda. Is there a second? Second. All in favor? I. I. Aye.
